## Description
Provide a summary of the changes and the rationale behind them. Include any relevant motivation, architectural considerations, or implementation details.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code style / Formatting / Static analysis fix

## UI Changes (If applicable)
Provide screenshots, GIFs, or video recordings illustrating the before and after states.
| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
|        |       |

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated/generated the API baseline signatures via `./gradlew apiDump`
- [ ] My changes generate no new Detekt warnings or Ktlint formatting errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (including screenshot/screenshot tests if UI component)
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
